latestIgtvVideos.title: Adieu
latestIgtvVideos.caption: Simpler were those days when we weren't locked in our houses & our major worry was to remember the dance steps, which clearly no one did 😂

latestIgtvVideos.title: Xanadu Youth Carnival
latestIgtvVideos.caption: Two days in nature. Best Music, Great food & College Buddies. Can't believe it's been a year already. @ankusha__ @manikdhingra_22 @muditajain96

latestIgtvVideos.caption: wait for the CLIMAX.

latestPosts.caption: Special thanks to @sahilbedi.kirpa @saloni.kirpa for getting me to Dubai and helping me out in every tiny detail. This is the trailer - picture abhi baki hai mere dost 🌻

Grateful for moments that remind you how far you’ve come. Attending my first VIP launch event in Dubai was truly special, and being there representing Kirpa Properties made it even more meaningful.

A big thank you to @manpreet.kirpa our mentor, for giving me this opportunity and trusting me to be part of such an incredible evening. Looking forward to many more milestones ahead with @kirpa.properties 

Kirpa ❤️

latestPosts.caption:
We at Kirpa, work night and day, to make sure our investors get the best possible unit. The only request to our investors will be to timely deposit the EOI, to select the best company, and the best agent in that company. Haha and that would be me :P

📧 samaksh@kirpaproperties.com 
📞 +971 585 2405 77

Reached home at 2 AM last night and in @theritzcarltondifc for @imtiazdevelopments allotment day at 7 Am In the morning !!! 

📧 samaksh@kirpaproperties.com 
📞 +971 585 2405 77

Dubai’s skyline is evolving, and so are the opportunities. From iconic communities by Emaar to Sobha’s premium quality, DAMAC’s beachside lifestyle developments, and Imtiaz’s modern, investor-focused projects, the city continues to redefine real estate.

Whether you’re investing for strong returns or searching for your dream home, Dubai offers something for every vision.

📧 samaksh@kirpaproperties.com 
📞 +971 585 2405 77

Let’s connect @ +971585240577

#DubaiRealEstate #DubaiProperty #Emaar #Sobha #DAMAC Imtiaz PropertyInvestment DubaiInvestments LuxuryLiving UAERealEstate
